addPeople.modalDescription: Activate or search for people to add to the library.
addPeople.adultModalDescription: Activate or search for adult people to add to the library.
addPeople.noInactive: All discovered people are already in your library.
addPeople.noInactiveDesc: Scan and organize new movies or TV shows to find more cast and crew suggestions.
addPeople.adultNoInactive: All discovered adult people are already in your library.
addPeople.adultNoInactiveDesc: Scan and organize new adult titles to find more cast and creator suggestions.
addPeople.noSearchResultsDesc: No people in your local pack matched this search. Try another name.
addPeople.noFilterResultsDesc: Try clearing or relaxing the local people filters to see more suggestions.
addPeople.adultNoSearchResultsDesc: No adult people in your local pack matched this search. Try another name.
addPeople.adultNoFilterResultsDesc: Try clearing or relaxing the local adult people filters to see more suggestions.
addPeople.adultTmdbSearchPlaceholder: Search for adult stars, performers, or creators...
addPeople.searchEmptyDesc: Find actors, directors, or writers on remote database and add them to your library.
addPeople.searchNoResultsDesc: No people on the remote database matched this search. Try another name.
addPeople.adultSearchEmptyDesc: Find adult performers and creators on the remote database and add them to your library.
addPeople.adultSearchNoResultsDesc: No adult people on the remote database matched this search. Try another name.
addPeople.bulkFinishedToast: Bulk import complete! View results on the People tab.
addPeople.bannerPendingActions: Bulk import completed with pending actions (unresolved matches or unmatched names).
addPeople.resolveModalDescription: Select correct matches or review unmatched names.
addPeople.adultBulkStartedToast: Adult bulk import started in background...
addPeople.adultBulkFinishedToast: Adult bulk import complete! View results on the Adult People tab.
addPeople.adultBannerPendingActions: Adult bulk import completed with pending actions (unresolved matches or unmatched names).
addPeople.adultResolveModalDescription: Select correct adult matches or review unmatched names.
addPeople.adultNoReportFound: No adult bulk import report found.
addPeople.bulkPendingConfirmDescription: If you close this report, you will not be able to return to these unresolved bulk import details later.
addPeople.bulkPendingConfirmBody: Review the matches now if you still want to choose the correct people or keep unmatched names for later.
addPeople.bulkPendingBlockedToast: Finish reviewing the current bulk import details first. Resolve the right matches or discard this report before starting another import.
addPeople.adultBulkPendingConfirmDescription: If you close this adult report, you will not be able to return to these unresolved adult bulk import details later.
addPeople.adultBulkPendingConfirmBody: Review the adult matches now if you still want to choose the correct people or keep unmatched names for later.
addPeople.adultBulkPendingBlockedToast: Finish reviewing the current adult bulk import details first. Resolve the right matches or discard this report before starting another import.

movies.title: No Movies Found
movies.description: Your movies library is currently empty. Run a scan or add media in the organizer.

collections.title: No Collections Found
collections.description: Your collections library is currently empty. Group movies and tv into custom collections.

tv.title: No TV Shows Found
tv.description: Your TV shows library is currently empty. Scan and match tv in the organizer.

people.title: No People Found
people.description: No directors, actors, or writers registered. Try scanning media to extract cast details.

adult.title: No Adult Content Found
adult.description: Your adult media library is empty. Ensure files are correctly matched and organized.

adult_tv.title: No Adult TV Shows Found
adult_tv.description: Your adult TV shows library is empty. Ensure files are correctly matched and organized.

scenes.title: No Scenes Found
scenes.description: Your scenes library is empty. Scan and match adult content in the organizer.

adult_scenes.title: No Scenes Found
adult_scenes.description: Your scenes library is empty. Scan and match adult content in the organizer.

adultPeople.title: No Adult Stars Found
adultPeople.description: No actors or creators from adult media have been registered yet.

adultCollections.title: No Adult Collections Found
adultCollections.description: Your adult collections library is currently empty. Group adult media into custom collections.

adultTags.title: No Adult Tags Created
adultTags.description: Organize your adult media with custom tags. You can add tags in the media details page.

tags.title: No Tags Created
tags.description: Organize your media with custom tags. You can add tags in the media details page.

search.title: No matching {tab} found
search.description: Try a different search term or check the spelling.

filter.title: Nothing fits these filters
filter.description: Try clearing or relaxing a few filters to bring {tab} back into view.

tags.emptyFocusTitle: This tag is ready to use.
tags.emptyFocusDescription: Add this tag to movies, shows, or people and they will appear here.
tags.modalDescription: Create a new custom tag for organizing your media.
tags.editModalDescription: Rename the tag or adjust its color.
tags.deleteModalDescription: Remove this tag from every tagged item.
tags.deleteConfirm: Delete "{name}" and remove it from all tagged items?
tags.errorExists: A tag with this name already exists

details.allKeywordsTagged: All keywords already exist as tags.
details.noBackdropsAvailable: No good backdrop options found for this title.
details.backdropFilterRunning: Checking title backdrops ({{checked}}/{{total}}). You can keep browsing.
details.backdropFilterFinishing: Finalizing backdrop availability. You can keep browsing.
details.deletePerformerWarning: Are you sure you want to permanently delete this performer? All manually entered attributes, custom biographies, overrides, and ratings will be lost. If you do not want to lose this data, you can make the performer inactive from their profile page instead.

validation.height: Height must be between 50 and 300 cm
validation.weight: Weight must be between 30 and 300 kg
validation.cupSize: Cup size must be 1-3 letters (e.g. B, DD)
validation.bandSize: Band size must be between 10 and 100
validation.correctErrors: Please correct the validation errors before saving.
